tools.name: backupRuns.sqlBackupRunsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the backup taken by a backup run.

tools.name: backupRuns.sqlBackupRunsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a backup run.

tools.name: backupRuns.sqlBackupRunsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new backup run on demand.

tools.name: backupRuns.sqlBackupRunsList
tools.description: Lists all backup runs associated with the project or a given instance and configuration in the reverse chronological order of the backup initiation time.

tools.name: connect.sqlConnectGenerateEphemeral
tools.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.

tools.name: connect.sqlConnectGet
tools.description: Retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a database from a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesInsert
tools.description: Inserts a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesList
tools.description: Lists databases in the specified Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesPatch
tools.description: Partially updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: databases.sqlDatabasesUpdate
tools.description: Updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: flags.sqlFlagsList
tools.description: Lists all available database flags for Cloud SQL instances.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesAddServerCa
tools.description: Adds a new trusted Certificate Authority (CA) version for the specified instance. Required to prepare for a certificate rotation. If a CA version was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces that version. There cannot be more than one CA version waiting to be rotated in.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesClone
tools.description: Creates a Cloud SQL instance as a clone of the source instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesDemoteMaster
tools.description: Demotes the stand-alone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica for an external database server.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesExport
tools.description: Exports data from a Cloud SQL instance to a Cloud Storage bucket as a SQL dump or CSV file.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesFailover
tools.description: Initiates a manual failover of a high availability (HA) primary instance to a standby instance, which becomes the primary instance. Users are then rerouted to the new primary. For more information, see the [Overview of high availability](https://cloud.google.com/sql/docs/mysql/high-availability) page in the Cloud SQL documentation. If using Legacy HA (MySQL only), this causes the instance to failover to its failover replica instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesImport
tools.description: Imports data into a Cloud SQL instance from a SQL dump or CSV file in Cloud Storage.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesInsert
tools.description: Creates a new Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesList
tools.description: Lists instances under a given project.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesListServerCas
tools.description: Lists all of the trusted Certificate Authorities (CAs) for the specified instance. There can be up to three CAs listed: the CA that was used to sign the certificate that is currently in use, a CA that has been added but not yet used to sign a certificate, and a CA used to sign a certificate that has previously rotated out.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesPatch
tools.description: Partially updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance by merging the request with the current configuration. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesPromoteReplica
tools.description: Promotes the read replica instance to be a stand-alone Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesResetSslConfig
tools.description: Deletes all client certificates and generates a new server SSL certificate for the instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesRestart
tools.description: Restarts a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesRestoreBackup
tools.description: Restores a backup of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesRotateServerCa
tools.description: Rotates the server certificate to one signed by the Certificate Authority (CA) version previously added with the addServerCA method.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesStartReplica
tools.description: Starts the replication in the read replica instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesStopReplica
tools.description: Stops the replication in the read replica instance.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesTruncateLog
tools.description: Truncate MySQL general and slow query log tables MySQL only.

tools.name: instances.sqlInstancesUpdate
tools.description: Updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.

tools.name: operations.sqlOperationsGet
tools.description: Retrieves an instance operation that has been performed on an instance.

tools.name: operations.sqlOperationsList
tools.description: Lists all instance operations that have been performed on the given Cloud SQL instance in the reverse chronological order of the start time.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesGetDiskShrinkConfig
tools.description: Get Disk Shrink Config for a given instance.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesPerformDiskShrink
tools.description: Perform Disk Shrink on primary instance.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesRescheduleMaintenance
tools.description: Reschedules the maintenance on the given instance.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesResetReplicaSize
tools.description: Reset Replica Size to primary instance disk size.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesStartExternalSync
tools.description: Start External primary instance migration.

tools.name: projects.sqlProjectsInstancesVerifyExternalSyncSettings
tools.description: Verify External primary instance external sync settings.

tools.name: sslCerts.sqlSslCertsCreateEphemeral
tools.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.

tools.name: sslCerts.sqlSslCertsDelete
tools.description: Deletes the SSL certificate. For First Generation instances, the certificate remains valid until the instance is restarted.

tools.name: sslCerts.sqlSslCertsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a particular SSL certificate. Does not include the private key (required for usage). The private key must be saved from the response to initial creation.

tools.name: sslCerts.sqlSslCertsInsert
tools.description: Creates an SSL certificate and returns it along with the private key and server certificate authority. The new certificate will not be usable until the instance is restarted.

tools.name: sslCerts.sqlSslCertsList
tools.description: Lists all of the current SSL certificates for the instance.

tools.name: tiers.sqlTiersList
tools.description: Lists all available machine types (tiers) for Cloud SQL, for example, `db-custom-1-3840`. For more information, see https://cloud.google.com/sql/pricing.

tools.name: users.sqlUsersDelete
tools.description: Deletes a user from a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: users.sqlUsersGet
tools.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a user.

tools.name: users.sqlUsersInsert
tools.description: Creates a new user in a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: users.sqlUsersList
tools.description: Lists users in the specified Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: users.sqlUsersUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing user in a Cloud SQL instance.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
